targets.expr: label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_pv_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) /1000, "series", "PV") or label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) /1000, "series", "Grid import") or label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) * -1) /1000, "series", "Home") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",loadpoint!~"$loadpointBlocklist"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month, loadpoint)) * -1) /1000, "loadpoint", "series") or label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) * -1) /1000, "series", "Feed-in")

label_set(1 - (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) / ((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) + (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",loadpoint!~"$loadpointBlocklist",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month))), "series", "Autarky") or label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_pv_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) - (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month))) / (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_pv_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)), "series", "Self-consumption")

label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month) - sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_ext_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",title!="",title!~"$extBlocklist",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) / 1000, "series", "Other") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_ext_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",title!="",title!~"$extBlocklist"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month, title)) /1000), "title", "series") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_aux_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",title!="",title!~"$auxBlocklist"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month, title)) /1000), "title", "series")

label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_battery_discharge_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month) ) - (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_battery_charge_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month))) / 1000, "series", "Battery") or label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month)) /1000, "series", "Home") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",loadpoint!~"$loadpointBlocklist"}[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_month, loadpoint)) /1000), "loadpoint", "series")

properties.value: गतिशील टैरिफ से बचाई गई बिजली कीमत

panels.description: उपभोग कई महीनों बाद ही सार्थक होता है। बाहरी चार्जिंग को अनदेखा किया जाता है और परिणाम विकृत हो जाता है।
panels.title: वाहन

panels.description: किलोमीटर केवल तब दर्ज होते हैं जब वाहन प्लग इन हो। यदि कम बार प्लग इन किया जाता है, तो किलोमीटर छूट सकते हैं।
panels.title: मासिक चले हुए किलोमीटर

panels.description: मान अनुमानित हैं। बाहरी चार्जिंग शामिल नहीं है और दर्ज किलोमीटर इस पर निर्भर करते हैं कि वाहन कितनी बार प्लग इन किया जाता है।
panels.title: खपत (kWh/100km)
